Document:
# Roleplay Rule 5 - Follow reasonable escalation
Antagonists aren't held to escalation rules.
Don't attack people without proper reason and without stating intention.
Don’t start arguments and insult people without reasonable in-character reason.
Security officers may forgo escalation rules if the other party is brandishing a lethal weapon or other items signifying lethal intent.
Security officers should engage in conversation with wanted suspects before moving to non-lethal takedowns, if possible.
